name: SyntaxHighlighter
description: A code syntax highlighting component using react-syntax-highlighter with oneDark theme.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying code snippets with syntax highlighting.
Uses Prism highlighter with oneDark theme.
Specify language prop for proper highlighting.

showLineNumbers.description: Shows line numbers in code block.

styling_info.visual_description: Code block with dark background and syntax-colored text. Small font size with proper code formatting.

Do: Use for code examples and documentation
Provide copy button for user convenience
Dont: Don't use for very long code blocks

Example.title: Example
